title: spongebobby by Halos1
lyrics: 808 costuming, Halo's motherfuckin' one-zo It's got me done-zo, they either or, they just don't stop, bitch DJ Slayer, make the money flare Here on the block, leave a fuckboy and nothing but his socks I hope that bag stuff is cold on the rock You get dumped on my block like a game of hopscotch Now you're blue to blue like a pack of Pop Rocks I'm the boss, I'm a boss, got a bottle full of VODs When I set up alarms, I'mma pay you on the rocks How you do it? I'm so hungry for them blue face Hundreds, thousands, millions, we still countin' I want that feelin', so I'm gonna go get it Make my opps look pathetic, how you stand unaffected No affection, nobody ever loved me No friends on these streets, they too ugly Lookin' at the sky, ain't nobody above me I'm like a bad pass in rugby I'm above your head, halo to an angel above your head Get bread like a bakery, y'all lookin' fake to me Thankfully, discernment is one of my gifts I'mma break these handcuffs off when I flick my wrist Damn, my dope bitch control your bitch Girl, she already actin' like she think I'm a trick And if she keeps it up, y'all about to be licked Said, bitch, please fix your face Starin' at me, you need to look the other way Bitch, don't you know that you starin' at Medusa Fusion, ha, now your boy go tanks Smokin' Waymo dinks and Tommy John With a never-ending roll in his palm Hit the gun, go, toast While y'all worry about security, I'm out the back door The most charming asshole y'all ever meet But don't get attached, I leave bitches while they sleep Like, damn, quit snorin', boo Left the snorin', left the sleepin', but that's what my dick'll do Halos, one, now halos, two Now halos, one, not much you knew Ay, ay Halos, one, now halos, two Now halos, one, not much you knew Imma leave it and that's it Y'all some sheep, just quit Y'all sleepin' on the kid That's it, that's it I'mma leave and that's it Y'all some sheep, just quit Y'all sleepin' on the kid That's it, that's it Halos, one That's it That's it, that's it I'm the reaper Ay, ay I'm the reaper Call, call Ay, I'm the reaper Ay, ay I'm the reaper

And if she keeps it up, y'all about to be licked
